data.title: 10 Crypto Tokens Defy November Sell-Off With Surging Trading Volume
data.description:
Despite one of the harshest market pullbacks of the year, a new Santiment report highlights a cluster of tokens posting massive trading-volume spikes while the broader crypto market remains under pressure. These surges don’t necessarily signal immediate price breakouts, but they often reveal where trader attention, and early liquidity, is rotating during periods of volatility.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/10-crypto-tokens-defy-november-sell-off-with-surging-trading-volume/

data.title: Strategy's Bitcoin holdings have fallen below $55 billion, with unrealized profits dropping significantly to approximately $6 billion.
data.description: According to SaylorTracker data, due to the short-term market crash, the market value of Bitcoin holdings at Bitcoin treasury company Strategy fell to $54.59 billion, with an mNAV of 1.04. The unrealized profit of its 649,870 Bitcoins also fell below the $10 billion mark, now significantly decreasing to approximately $6 billion, and the overall return rate dropped to 12.85%. Strategy's average purchase price for Bitcoin was $74,433, and the current market price is only about $10,000 away from falling below that level.

data.title: Bitget Wallet supports full-chain interaction with Sei without gas fees.
data.description: Bitget Wallet has launched gas-free transfers and transactions on the Sei network. Based on Bitget Wallet's Paymaster architecture, this feature allows users to make up to three gas-free transfers and three gas-free transactions daily on the Sei network. Bitget Wallet is the first wallet to support gas-free multi-chain interactions, currently covering networks including Solana, Tron, Arbitrum, Base, Polygon, Morph, and Sei. Simultaneously, its one-click gas payment function for stablecoins already supports major public chains such as Ethereum, Base, BNB Chain, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Solana, Morph, and TRON.

data.title: Nvidia's Stock Volatility Raises Concerns Over Financial Discrepancies
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, financial market independent researcher Shanaka Anslem Perera reported a significant market shift as Nvidia's stock initially surged by 5% following its earnings report, only to plummet into negative territory within 18 hours. Wall Street algorithms detected discrepancies in Nvidia's financial data that went unnoticed by human analysts.

Nvidia's accounts receivable increased by 89% over the past year to $33.4 billion, with payment cycles extending from 46 to 53 days. Simultaneously, chip inventory rose by 32% to $19.8 billion. Despite reporting $19.3 billion in profits, the company only generated $14.5 billion in cash flow, resulting in a conversion rate of 75%, significantly lower than the industry average of 95%. This $4.8 billion gap is considered critical.

The AI ecosystem's financial loop was revealed, with Nvidia investing $2 billion in xAI, which borrowed $12.5 billion to purchase Nvidia chips. Microsoft invested $13 billion in OpenAI, which committed to buying $50 billion worth of Azure services, while Microsoft placed a $100 billion order with Nvidia. Oracle provided OpenAI with $300 billion in cloud credits, which OpenAI used to purchase Nvidia chips. This cycle resulted in revenue being repeatedly counted without actual cash flow.

Smart money has already exited, with Peter Thiel selling $100 million in Nvidia stock on November 9, SoftBank liquidating $5.8 billion in holdings on November 11, and Michael Burry purchasing March 2026 Nvidia put options at $140. Bitcoin's value dropped from $126,000 to $86,000, with analysts warning that a further 40% decline in Nvidia's stock could trigger $23 billion in forced Bitcoin liquidations, potentially causing a market collapse.

A timeline has been set, with bad debts expected to be revealed in February 2026, followed by a credit rating downgrade in March and the first financial restatement in April. Nvidia's fair value is estimated at $71, compared to the current $186, indicating a 162% overvaluation. The countdown to a 90-day AI bubble collapse has begun.

Overall, Perera expresses caution regarding central bank interventions, geopolitical tensions, and technology concentration risks. He advises investors to focus on assets driven by "thermodynamics and game theory" rather than relying on traditional central bank strategies.

data.title: Binance Engages VIP Community with Exclusive AMA Session
data.description:
Binance Blog published a new article, highlighting the recent engagement with its VIP community through an exclusive AMA session. On 18 August 2025, Binance hosted its inaugural VIP Community AMA, offering over 1,000 members of the Binance VIP Telegram Channel a unique opportunity to interact directly with Binance executives. This initiative aimed to foster personalized responses and meaningful dialogue, emphasizing Binance's commitment to actively listening to and valuing the insights of its VIP community.

During the session, VIP members raised inquiries about various topics, including portfolio management tools, AI-powered features, the Binance Card, and other exclusive perks and opportunities. Binance executives provided insights into the enhancements made to the VIP Program, such as the introduction of VIP Sharing Sessions and the "My VIP" section within the app, which offers easier access to VIP resources. Additionally, high-APR staking opportunities have been made available exclusively for VIPs, with more exciting features planned for the future.

The discussion also touched on portfolio management tools for traders, with Binance exploring improvements across its P&L pages to consolidate multiple pages into a unified interface with enhanced analytical tools. Although no specific timeline was provided, Binance encouraged VIP members to share their suggestions on valuable features, promising to prioritize enhancements based on community feedback.

AI-powered tools were another focal point, with Binance committed to enhancing its AI capabilities to deliver smarter, faster, and more seamless crypto experiences for all users. While exclusive AI tools for VIPs are not yet available, Binance introduced an AI Select feature that provides real-time sentiment analysis, inviting the VIP community to share their preferences for future AI tool implementations.

Regarding the Binance Card, VIP members can access specialized Binance Black Cards if they meet specific eligibility criteria. Binance also offers exclusive swag packs to VIPs through various channels, including VIP-specific campaigns and the VIP Growth Program. These packs are awarded when members advance to higher VIP tiers, with seasonal greeting gifts sent during special occasions.

The AMA session concluded with discussions on maximizing portfolio earnings through passive income options like staking. Binance shared various products available across different asset types, emphasizing the importance of reviewing product terms carefully. The second VIP Community Written AMA successfully brought VIP members closer to Binance’s teams, offering direct answers and meaningful engagement. Participants gained valuable insights and had the chance to earn rewards for their involvement.

data.title: Dalio Warns Against Premature Exit from AI Market Amid Bubble Concerns
data.description: According to PANews, Bridgewater Associates founder Ray Dalio has recently commented on the valuation bubble in the AI sector. Despite signs of overvaluation, Dalio advises investors against hastily withdrawing from the market, as current conditions do not include triggers like monetary policy tightening that could burst the bubble. He noted that bubbles typically burst when the market requires asset liquidation, a signal not currently present. Dalio emphasized that the market could still experience significant growth before any potential bubble burst.

data.description:

data.title: Aave Whale Faces $3.88 Million Liquidation Amid Market Downturn

data.title: A hardcore short-selling whale's 20x leveraged Bitcoin short position is now showing a floating profit of over $34 million.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that the long-term short whale (0x5D2...9bb7) who previously shorted BTC four times in a row has recently opened a 20x leveraged Bitcoin short position and is now showing a floating profit of $34.03 million. Currently, its short position is about 1,232 BTC, with a position value of $103 million, an average entry price of $111,499.3, and a liquidation price of $92,042.7.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary's Appearance at Bitcoin Bar Sparks Community Reaction
data.description:
According to Odaily, U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent made an unexpected appearance at the opening night of Pubkey, a Bitcoin-themed bar in Washington, which has stirred significant reactions within the Bitcoin community. Many view this as a notable signal for Bitcoin.

Ben Werkman, Chief Investment Officer at Bitcoin reserve company Strive, commented on the X platform that Bessent's attendance at the Pubkey DC launch could be seen as a moment that, in hindsight, will appear 'obvious.' Steven Lubka, Vice President of Investor Relations at Nakamoto, referred to it as 'the signal you've been waiting for.'

Scott Bessent is widely regarded as a pro-cryptocurrency figure. His nomination for Treasury Secretary at the end of 2024 drew attention, as he had previously advocated for the U.S. to become a global hub for digital assets and supported several cryptocurrency-related bills, including the GENIUS Act. In August, Bessent clarified that his department was still exploring budget-neutral ways to purchase Bitcoin for strategic reserves.

Bessent's support for the Bitcoin bar comes amid a bearish sentiment in the Bitcoin market. After reaching an all-time high of $125,100 on October 5, Bitcoin has entered a downward trend, trading at approximately $85,500 at the time of reporting.

data.title: BTC plunged to $82,000, ETH fell to $2,669, and five Hyperliquid accounts were liquidated, resulting in losses exceeding ten million dollars.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, during a sharp drop, BTC fell to $82,000 and ETH fell to $2,669. Within that minute, five accounts with liquidations exceeding $10 million were liquidated, all on Hyperliquid. The largest single liquidation reached $36.78 million.

data.title: The probability of SOL falling to $100 in November has risen to 21% on Polymarket.
data.description: According to Polymarket data, the probability of SOL falling to $100 in November has increased from 8% yesterday to 21%, while the probability of it falling to $110 in the same period has increased from 10% to 40%.

data.title: In the past 24 hours, the total amount of liquidations worldwide reached $1.9 billion, with the largest single liquidation valued at $36.7828 million.
data.description: According to monitoring, in the past 24 hours, a total of 389,052 people worldwide were liquidated, with a total liquidation amount of $1.9 billion. 24-hour liquidation breakdown: Long positions liquidated: $1.775 billion; Short positions liquidated: $125 million. Largest single liquidation: Occurred on the BTC-USD trading pair on Hyperliquid, valued at $36.7828 million.

data.title: Brother Machi's 25x leveraged ETH long position was liquidated, leaving his wallet with only $15,538, a single loss of $1.05 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, Machi Dage's 25x leveraged ETH long position was completely liquidated, resulting in a loss of $1.05 million. His total losses have exceeded $20.23 million, leaving him with only $15,538 in his wallet.
